query:
SELECT 
  v.nome,
  v.metaTrimestral,
  mt.trimestre,
  mt.metaTrimestral as meta_tabela_metas,
  mt.superMeta,
  mt.bonusMeta,
  mt.bonusSuperMeta
FROM vendedores v
LEFT JOIN metas_trimestrais mt ON v.id = mt.vendedorId AND mt.trimestre = 'Meta Trimestral 1'
WHERE v.nome = 'Júlia';
